questions: What is the name of the technology?
What category does the technology belong to?
What organization(s) or company(ies) developed the technology?
What is the current technology readiness level (TRL) or deployment stage?
How does the technology work?
What material, process, or system does the technology replace or improve?
What performance metric is being improved?
What is the reported reduction in greenhouse gas emissions (%)?
What is the absolute emissions intensity (kg CO₂e per unit product)?
What lifecycle boundary is used for the emissions calculation?
Does the technology increase emissions elsewhere in the supply chain?
What assumptions were used in the environmental analysis?
What is the energy requirement of the technology?
What type(s) of energy are required?
Does the technology increase or decrease total energy demand?
What is the capital cost (CAPEX)?
What is the operating cost (OPEX)?
What is the cost premium or cost savings relative to the conventional approach?
What assumptions were used in the economic analysis?
Can the technology be implemented using existing infrastructure?
What are the primary barriers to adoption?
What geographic, supply-chain, or resource constraints exist?
Has the technology been deployed commercially?
What evidence supports the reported claims?
What is the confidence level in the reported claims?
What information is missing or uncertain?
